overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a post-apocalyptic open-world game showing a character walking through an abandoned rural settlement with wooden buildings, transitioning onto a paved mountain road. The environment features lush green forests, distant snow-capped mountains, and an abandoned vehicle on the roadside.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned rural settlement with scattered wooden cabins

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the abandoned settlement carrying a rifle and backpack, exploring the deserted area

entered.detail: dilapidated wooden cabin with porch and broken windows
small yellow wooden outbuilding with green roof
tall metal water tower rising above the tree line
dense coniferous forest covering the hillside in the background
dry dirt and gravel path through the settlement

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an abandoned rural settlement with weathered wooden cabins and yellow outbuildings scattered among evergreen trees. The ground is dry dirt and gravel, with a large water tower visible in the distance against a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition area approaching wooden gate structure at settlement edge

events.description: approaching and passing under large wooden archway gate marking the settlement boundary

agents.ego_description: continuing forward toward the wooden gate structure at the edge of the settlement, heading toward the mountain

entered.detail: large wooden log archway with sign marking the entrance or exit to the settlement area
prominent snow-covered mountain peak becoming visible through the gate

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a large wooden archway gate that marks the boundary of the settlement. The yellow building falls behind to the left as the snow-capped mountain becomes visible in the distance beyond the gate, and the character passes underneath the wooden structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned rural highway with mountain backdrop

events.description: steps from dirt path onto cracked paved asphalt road
turns left onto the paved road and continues walking along the winding highway

agents.ego_description: walking along the abandoned paved road, passing a derelict SUV, heading toward the snow-capped mountain in the distance

notable_agents.action: abandoned red SUV with open trunk and broken windows parked on the roadside

entered.detail: cracked asphalt two-lane road with yellow center line and white edge markings
derelict red SUV with open trunk, broken windows, and visible rust
diamond-shaped yellow warning sign with pedestrian symbol
metal guard rail along the left edge of the winding road

segments.scene_description: The character transitions onto a cracked asphalt road, passing an abandoned red SUV with its trunk open. The road winds through evergreen forest with a prominent snow-capped mountain visible ahead, and the character continues walking along the deserted highway as the settlement disappears behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a weathered rural settlement into a desolate mountain highway. It begins by following a character through a cluster of wooden cabins and yellow outbuildings nestled among evergreen trees on dry, gravelly ground. As the character advances, the scene shifts toward a large wooden archway gate, leaving the settlement buildings behind while a snow-capped mountain emerges on the distant horizon. The camera then follows the character through the gate and onto a cracked asphalt road, passing an abandoned red SUV with its trunk open. Finally, the environment opens up into a winding highway flanked by dense forests, with the settlement disappearing in the distance as the path leads directly toward the towering snowy peak.
